_description: Specification for odft_template.svg. Coordinates are in SVG user units (px). All elements are identified by inkscape:label. This file documents what code can safely read or modify.

colour_palette._note: All colours used across the template.

defs._note: One unused clipPath (clippath5139) exists and can be removed. All 12 linearGradients are actively referenced.

gradients._note: Three base gradients define colour stops; nine applied gradients reference them with specific position transforms. The grey ribbon pair (2739) is used by the grey-out medal placeholders. The coloured ribbon pair (2683) is used by the earned medals. The calendar header gradient (19) fills the calendar top bar.

layout._note: Key structural regions of the canvas.

header_bars.label: header-bars
header_bars.description: Three coloured bars across the very top of the card.

editable_elements._note: Elements a script is expected to update for each monthly card. All identified by inkscape:label.

text.label: title-1
text.description: First word of the operation title, top-left aligned

text.label: month-text
text.description: Month name shown between the two medals

text.label: distance-medal-number
text.description: Distance count shown on the medal badge. Label is on the inner <tspan> (which carries the Franklin Gothic Demi font override), not the parent <text>.

text.label: consistency-medal-number
text.description: Consistency count shown on the medal badge. Label is on the inner <tspan> (which carries the Franklin Gothic Demi font override), not the parent <text>.

toggleable_groups.label: distance-medal
toggleable_groups.description: Full-colour earned distance medal. Show when the distance medal is earned.

toggleable_groups.label: distance-medal-grey-out
toggleable_groups.description: Grey placeholder distance medal. Hide when the distance medal is earned.

toggleable_groups.label: consistency-medal
toggleable_groups.description: Full-colour earned consistency medal. Show when the consistency medal is earned.

toggleable_groups.label: consistency-medal-grey-out
toggleable_groups.description: Grey placeholder consistency medal. Hide when the consistency medal is earned.

calendar_day_grid.description: 5x7 grid of circle/ellipse elements inside the calendar-days group.

geometry._note: Columns 02-07 use <circle>. Column 01 (Sunday) uses <ellipse> with transform='scale(1,-1)' — cy is stored as a negative value in the SVG to compensate.

static_elements._note: These elements are not expected to change between monthly cards.

footer_swirl.label: footer-swirl
footer_swirl.description: Decorative swirl/rings in the lower section of the card

viking.label: viking
viking.description: Viking helmet silhouette graphic in the centre

logo_axe.label: logo-axe
logo_axe.description: Small axe logo mark in the footer area

calendar_outer.label: calendar-outer
calendar_outer.description: Rounded rectangle border of the calendar widget

calendar_header.label: calendar-header
calendar_header.description: Coloured header bar of the calendar widget, filled with the tricolour gradient

distance_text.label: distance-text
distance_text.description: Static 'Distance' label above the distance medal area

consistency_text.label: consistency-text
consistency_text.description: Static 'Consistency' label above the consistency medal area
